property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21.0.10\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\sneak\conda;C:\Users\sneak\conda\Library\mingw-w64\bin;C:\Users\sneak\conda\Library\usr\bin;C:\Users\sneak\conda\Library\bin;C:\Users\sneak\conda\Scripts;C:\Users\sneak\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;C:\Users\sneak\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\sneak\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\sneak\.dotnet\tools;C:\Users\sneak\AppData\Local\Muse Hub\lib;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\PyCharm Community Edition 2024.3.5\bin;C:\Users\sneak\AppData\Local\Programs\Fiddler;C:\Users\sneak\AppData\Local\Packages\PythonSoftwareFoundation.Python.3.13_qbz5n2kfra8p0\LocalCache\local-packages\Python313\Scripts;C:\Program Files\Git\git-cmd;C:\Users\sneak\miniconda3\;C:\Users\sneak\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1\bin;C:\Users\sneak\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;.

testcase.name: contextLoads
